creator: axl@iafrica.com
text:
The Configure script for sysutils/lsof doesn't know about
	FreeBSD 4.0 and assumes a FreeBSD 2.2 environment, where
	libkvm doesn't exist (I think, perhaps it's just different).

Fix: The following diff to the port's patch-ab teaches lsof's
	Configure script about FreeBSD 4.0:
How-To-Repeat: 
	On a machine where ``uname -r'' reports 4.0-CURRENT, do
	``cd /usr/ports/sysutils/lsof; make''.
